untranslatable_reason: Signal requires autocorrelation measurement (>5 bars lag), Ljung-Box statistical test (p-value < 0.10 for volatility clustering), and 3+ consecutive bar momentum persistence detection. These advanced statistical measures and multi-bar pattern recognition are not available in the allowed indicator set. The translation uses vol_ratio_20 and returns as proxies for information diffusion lag and momentum, but cannot precisely replicate the autocorrelation and Ljung-Box test requirements.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation: vol_ratio_20 used as proxy for volatility clustering (information diffusion), returns polarity for momentum direction, and volume spike detection (25% threshold ≈ 1.25x ratio). Momentum persistence across 3+ bars and precise autocorrelation lag measurement cannot be reliably expressed with available indicators.
